instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect uphill driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify uphill condition when Road_Gradient exceeds Uphill_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Road_Gradient > Uphill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Uphill
IF Road_Gradient <= Uphill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Normal

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect downhill driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect downhill condition when Road_Gradient falls below Downhill_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Road_Gradient < Downhill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Downhill
IF Road_Gradient >= Downhill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Normal

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall hold lower gear during uphill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when Hill_Mode equals Uphill.

L4_requirements: IF Hill_Mode = Uphill AND Engine_Load > Load_Threshold THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable engine braking during downhill conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall perform downshift when Hill_Mode equals Downhill.

L4_requirements: IF Hill_Mode = Downhill AND Vehicle_Speed > Downhill_Speed THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable hill detection when gradient signal becomes invalid.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable hill mode when Gradient_Signal_Valid equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Gradient_Signal_Valid = FALSE THEN Hill_Mode = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect uphill conditions using engine load.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect uphill when Engine_Load exceeds Load_Threshold and Vehicle_Speed decreases.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Load > Load_Threshold AND Vehicle_Speed_Decreasing = TRUE THEN Hill_Mode = Uphill
IF Engine_Load <= Load_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Normal

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain gear stability during hill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent gear hunting when Hill_Mode equals Uphill.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable hill mode only above minimum vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate hill detection when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Hill_Mode_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed <= Hill_Mode_Speed AND Hill_Mode_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Hill_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable hill detection during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit hill strategy when Transmission_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE AND Hill_Mode = Uphill THEN Maintain_Normal_Shifting

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift thresholds during hill driving.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase upshift RPM when Hill_Mode equals Uphill.

L4_requirements: IF Hill_Mode = Uphill THEN Upshift_RPM = Hill_Upshift_RPM
IF Hill_Mode = Uphill AND Engine_Speed > Hill_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
IF Hill_Mode = Normal THEN Upshift_RPM = Default_Upshift_RPM
